title: Mathematicians
description: Conduct research in fundamental mathematics or in application of mathematical techniques to science, management, and other fields. Solve problems in various fields using mathematical methods.

tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain knowledge in the field by reading professional journals, talking with other mathematicians, and attending professional conferences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop new principles and new relationships between existing mathematical principles to advance mathematical science.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Disseminate research by writing reports, publishing papers, or presenting at professional conferences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assemble sets of assumptions, and explore the consequences of each set.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform computations and apply methods of numerical analysis to data.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Address the relationships of quantities, magnitudes, and forms through the use of numbers and symbols.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct research to extend mathematical knowledge in traditional areas, such as algebra, geometry, probability, and logic.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop mathematical or statistical models of phenomena to be used for analysis or for computational simulation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apply mathematical theories and techniques to the solution of practical problems in business, engineering, the sciences, or other fields.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop computational methods for solving problems that occur in areas of science and engineering or that come from applications in business or industry.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design, analyze, and decipher encryption systems designed to transmit military, political, financial, or law-enforcement-related information in code.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
